inputs.label: Body Weight
inputs.businessContext: User body weight in kilograms for personalized calorie calculation based on metabolic energy expenditure.

inputs.label: Dance Duration
inputs.businessContext: Total time spent dancing in minutes, used to compute total calorie burn.

inputs.label: MET Value
inputs.businessContext: Metabolic Equivalent of Task representing intensity of dancing; typical values: 3-10 where 1 MET = 3.5 ml O2/kg/min.

inputs.label: Intensity Adjustment Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier to adjust calculated calories for perceived effort (0.5 = half effort, 2.0 = twice effort).
